---
name: FlowAI_Review_Scope_Request
description: To request a scope review from relevant agents to assess feasibility, identify gaps, and ensure alignment before approving a project scope.
---
REVIEW REQUEST
Task ID: TASK-20260403-001
Type: SCOPE REVIEW (assessment only — no implementation)
Document: clients/hey-aircon/plans/mvp_scope.md
Requested By: [your name]
Review Focus:
  - Is this scope feasible and well-defined for MVP?
  - What are the gaps, risks, or ambiguities?
  - What is missing that should be in scope?
Agents To Involve: PM, Engineering, QA, Prompt/Persona, Knowledge
Output Required: Consolidated Review Report from PM Agent
